examples.title: Bidirectional scroll
examples.description: A bounded viewport that scrolls both axes when the inner content exceeds both dimensions. Useful for wide tables or grids embedded in a fixed-size surface.

examples.title: Horizontal code snippet
examples.description: Horizontal scrolling for a long single-line code sample, rendered as a <pre> via the `as` prop so the region role is preserved alongside the semantic tag.
examples.code: $ bun run --filter @cinder/components build && bun run --filter @cinder/components test --coverage --reporter=verbose --bail

examples.title: Themed scrollbar tokens
examples.description: Overrides --cinder-scrollbar-thumb and --cinder-scrollbar-thumb-hover on a wrapping surface so the native scrollbar picks up brand colors without replacing it.
examples.code:
0.42.0

Adds scroll-area, themed via design tokens.

0.41.0

Combobox gains rich option rows with description and avatar.

0.40.0

Form-field contract lands on input, textarea, and select.

0.39.0

Changesets adopted; provenance-enabled publishing wired up.

0.38.0

Package exports unified under cinder/* with Shiki adapter.

examples.title: Vertical chat transcript
examples.description: A vertical scroll region with a meaningful accessible name, so assistive technology treats it as a landmark via the derived role="region".
examples.code:
Avery: morning! ready to pair on the migration?

Jordan: yep — pulling the branch now.

Avery: heads up, the seed script changed.

Jordan: noticed. running it locally first.

Avery: thanks. ping me when you hit the auth step.

Jordan: will do. tests are green on my end.

Avery: nice. I'll start drafting the changelog.

Jordan: cool — should I cherry-pick the hotfix in?

Avery: yes please, then squash before review.

Jordan: pushed. take a look when you can.
